_comment: Validation check registry — SSOT for all path-gated CI checks. Edit this file to add/modify behavioral checks. See scripts/governance/run-focused-ci-checks.sh for the runner.

schema.description: human-readable check name (shown in CI output)
schema.trigger_paths: list of repo-relative paths; check runs if ANY staged file matches (exact or prefix)
schema.command: array of command + args (run from repo root)
schema.enabled: bool; false = skip without error (default true)
schema.require_tool: optional tool name; if not in PATH, check is skipped with warning

intent routing map semantic prototype validation
command: import json; d=json.load(open('config/intent-routing-map.json')); intents=d.get('intents',{}); [exit(1) for k,v in intents.items() if not isinstance(v,dict) or 'profile' not in v]; print(f'Intent map valid: {len(intents)} intents')

checks.description: intent routing map profiles exist in canonical registry

dashboard aq-qa surfaces share one single-flight runner
dashboard.html inline JS syntax validation
command: const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('dashboard.html','utf8');const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script(?:\s[^>]*)?>([^]*?)<\/script>/g)].filter(m=>!/type\s*=\s*["']?module/i.test(m[0])).map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s);}catch(e){process.stderr.write('Script block '+i+': '+e.message+'\n');process.exit(1);}});console.log('Checked '+scripts.length+' non-module script blocks: syntax OK');

aq-screenshot local browser automation contract
security-systems domain baseline artifact presence check
command: import json,sys,os; reg=json.load(open('config/capability-lifecycle-registry.json')); ids=[c['id'] for c in reg['capabilities']]; assert 'security-systems' in ids, 'security-systems not in registry'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/PROJECT-SECURITY-SYSTEMS-PRD.md'), 'PRD missing'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/SECURITY-SYSTEMS-INSTRUCTIONS.md'), 'instructions missing'; assert os.path.exists('scripts/governance/tier0-validation-gate.sh'), 'tier0 gate missing'; print('security-systems domain: baseline artifacts present')

checks.description: systems-software domain tooling, artifact, and shellcheck availability check
command: import json,sys,os,stat,shutil; reg=json.load(open('config/capability-lifecycle-registry.json')); ids=[c['id'] for c in reg['capabilities']]; assert 'systems-software' in ids, 'systems-software not in registry'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/PROJECT-SYSTEMS-SOFTWARE-PRD.md'), 'PRD missing'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/SYSTEMS-SOFTWARE-INSTRUCTIONS.md'), 'instructions missing'; gate='scripts/governance/nix-static-analysis.sh'; assert os.path.exists(gate), f'{gate} missing'; s=os.stat(gate); assert s.st_mode & stat.S_IXUSR, f'{gate} not executable'; opts='nix/modules/core/options.nix'; assert os.path.exists(opts), f'{opts} missing (port SSOT gone)'; sc=shutil.which('shellcheck'); print(f'systems-software domain: artifacts OK; shellcheck={sc or "not-yet-deployed (requires nixos-rebuild)"}')

checks.description: embedded-hardware domain baseline artifact and hardware-matrix presence check
command: import json,sys,os,stat; reg=json.load(open('config/capability-lifecycle-registry.json')); ids=[c['id'] for c in reg['capabilities']]; assert 'embedded-hardware' in ids, 'embedded-hardware not in registry'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/PROJECT-EMBEDDED-HARDWARE-PRD.md'), 'PRD missing'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/PROJECT-EMBEDDED-HARDWARE-PLAN.md'), 'PLAN missing'; assert os.path.exists('.agent/EMBEDDED-HARDWARE-INSTRUCTIONS.md'), 'instructions missing'; matrix='config/hardware-capability-matrix.json'; assert os.path.exists(matrix), f'{matrix} missing (hardware SSOT gone)'; disc='scripts/governance/discover-system-facts.sh'; assert os.path.exists(disc), f'{disc} missing'; s=os.stat(disc); assert s.st_mode & stat.S_IXUSR, f'{disc} not executable'; print('embedded-hardware domain: baseline artifacts and hardware-matrix present')
